questions.question_text: Write a SQL query to find the second highest salary from an Employee table.
questions.ideal_answer: SELECT MAX(salary) FROM Employee WHERE salary < (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM Employee). Alternative: Use LIMIT with OFFSET or ROW_NUMBER() window function.

questions.question_text: When would you use a bar chart versus a line chart?
questions.ideal_answer: Bar charts for comparing discrete categories or groups. Line charts for showing trends over continuous time periods or ordered sequences.

questions.question_text: Explain the difference between correlation and causation.
questions.ideal_answer: Correlation shows relationship between variables but doesn't prove one causes the other. Causation requires controlled experiments, temporal precedence, and ruling out confounding variables.
